abstract: Get started with Tigris file storage. Walks through CLI setup (install via npm, authenticate, create bucket, create and assign access keys, configure environment), then covers the @tigrisdata/storage SDK for uploading, downloading, deleting, listing files, presigned URLs, and client-side browser uploads. Documents TigrisStorageConfig for per-call credential and bucket overrides, Editor vs ReadOnly access key roles, and includes common patterns like avatar uploads, API route file serving, and the handleClientUpload presigned URL flow.
